## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build/CI pipeline change
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] `dotnet build` succeeds without warnings or errors
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes all existing tests
- [ ] New tests have been added (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing performed on Windows [version]

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (nullable enabled, warnings as errors, XML docs on public APIs)
- [ ] I have added XML documentation comments for all new public APIs
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests for my changes
- [ ] I have not introduced Win32 P/Invoke outside `LangKeep.Infrastructure.Windows/Interop/`
- [ ] I have not added business logic to the UI layer
- [ ] All existing and new tests pass

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Additional Notes

Any additional information that would help reviewers understand the change.
